# Getting Help

Thanks for your interest in the Church Machine! Here is where to go depending on what you need.

## Questions & Discussion

For usage questions, conceptual questions, or general discussion, please use **GitHub Discussions**:

[Church Machine Discussions (Q&A)](https://github.com/khhodges/cloomc-project/discussions/categories/q-a)

The Q&A category lets the community upvote answers and maintainers can mark the accepted answer, making it easy to find solutions later.

## Bug Reports & Feature Requests

If you have found a confirmed bug or want to request a specific feature, please open a **GitHub Issue**:

[Open an Issue](https://github.com/khhodges/cloomc-project/issues/new/choose)

Before opening an issue, please search existing issues to avoid duplicates.

## What goes where?

| I need to...                        | Go to...          |
|-------------------------------------|-------------------|
| Ask a usage or conceptual question  | Discussions (Q&A) |
| Report a bug                        | Issues            |
| Request a feature                   | Issues            |
| Share something I built             | Discussions        |
